source: Enabling this setting can have a high impact on the cost of the log analytics service and data storage used by logging more data per each request. source: When configuring Named locations, the organization can create locations using Geographical location data or by defining source IP addresses or ranges. Configuring Named locations using a Country location does not provide the organization the ability to mark those locations as trusted, and any Conditional Access policy relying on those Countries location setting will not be able to use the All trusted locations setting within the Conditional Access policy. They instead will have to rely on the Select locations setting. This may add additional resource requirements when configuring and will require thorough organizational testing. In general, Conditional Access policies may completely prevent users from authenticating to Microsoft Entra ID, and thorough testing is recommended. To avoid complete lockout, a 'Break Glass' account with full Global Administrator rights is recommended in the event all other administrators are locked out of authenticating to Microsoft Entra ID. This 'Break Glass' account should be excluded from Conditional Access Policies and should be configured with the longest pass phrase feasible in addition to a FIDO2 security key or certificate kept in a very secure physical location. This account should only be used in the event of an emergency and complete administrator lockout. NOTE: Starting July 2024, Microsoft will begin requiring MFA for All Users - including Break Glass Accounts. By the end of October 2024, this requirement will be enforced. Physical FIDO2 security keys, or a certificate kept on secure removable storage can fulfill this MFA requirement. If opting for a physical device, that device should be kept in a very secure, documented physical location.

title: Ensure that HTTP(S) access from the Internet is evaluated and restricted
Ensure that multifactor authentication is required for risky sign-ins
Ensure that users and groups are synced from Microsoft Entra ID to Azure Databricks
Ensure that 'System Assigned Managed Identity' is set to 'On'
Ensure server parameter 'audit_log_enabled' is set to 'ON' for MySQL Database Server
Ensure Default Network Access Rule for Storage Accounts is Set to Deny
Ensure 'Cross Tenant Replication' is not enabled
Prefer using secrets as files over secrets as environment variables
source: CIS AZURE KUBERNETES SERVICE (AKS) BENCHMARK V1.7.0 PDF_updated_20250825_190647.json

title: Ensure App Service Environment has TLS 1.0 and 1.1 disabled
Ensure end-to-end TLS encryption is enabled
Ensure 'Minimum Inbound TLS Version' is set to '1.2' or higher
Ensure clusters are created with Private Endpoint Enabled and Public Access Disabled
source: CIS AZURE KUBERNETES SERVICE (AKS) BENCHMARK V1.7.0 PDF_updated_20250825_190647.json

title: Ensure that 'Auditing' is set to 'On'
Ensure 'Cross Subscription Restore' is set to 'Disabled' or 'Permanently Disabled' on Recovery Services vaults
Ensure 'Additional email addresses' is Configured with a Security Contact Email
Use Entra ID Client Authentication and Azure RBAC where possible.
Ensure that Private Endpoints are Used for Azure Key Vault
Ensure 'Allow storage account key access' for Azure Storage Accounts is 'Disabled'
Ensure Private Endpoints are used to access {service}
Ensure That Microsoft Defender for Open-Source Relational Databases Is Set To 'On'
Ensure 'HTTP version' is set to '2.0' (if in use)
Ensure Batch pools disk encryption is set enabled
Ensure Azure Resource Manager Delete locks are applied to Azure Storage Accounts
Ensure that 'File Integrity Monitoring' component status is set to 'On'
Ensure that 'Secure transfer required' is set to 'Enabled'
Ensure Batch account is set to use customer-managed keys to encrypt data
Ensure 'Microsoft Entra Authentication' is 'Enabled'
'Write'
source: Being a level 2, enabling this setting can have a high impact on the cost of data storage used for logging more data per each request. Do not enable this without determining your need for this level of logging or forget to check in on data usage and projected cost.

title: Ensure Private endpoints are considered for Batch accounts
Ensure end-to-end TLS encryption is enabled
Ensure 'Python version' is currently supported (if in use)
Ensure the 'Minimum TLS version' for storage accounts is set to 'Version 1.2'
Ensure 'Encryption key source' is set to 'Customer Managed Key' for Azure NetApp Files accounts
Ensure that data at rest and in transit is encrypted in Azure Databricks using customer managed keys (CMK)
Ensure that a custom role is assigned permissions for administering resource locks
